name: Scrap Hound
card_image_description: A border of cracked concrete and rusted rebar. In the center, a lean, dog-like creature constructed from mismatched pieces of scrap metal—license plates for armor, exhaust pipes for legs, and glowing red LEDs for eyes—snarls aggressively in a junkyard setting.

name: Rust Golem
card_image_description: A border of cracked concrete and rusted rebar. In the center, a hulking, humanoid figure made of fused, rusted car bodies and construction debris lumbers through a ruined city street, one arm ending in a twisted girder.

name: Neon Stalker
card_image_description: A border of cracked concrete and rusted rebar. In the center, a sleek, panther-like beast made of glossy black metal, with glowing pink and blue neon tubes tracing its musculature, is crouched low on a skyscraper rooftop at night, ready to pounce.

name: Cyber Wolf
card_image_description: A border of dark, hexagonal carbon fiber plating. In the center, a large, powerful wolf whose natural form is augmented with cybernetics. One leg is a silver piston, its jaw is reinforced with steel, and its eyes glow with a menacing blue light as it stalks through a high-tech facility.

name: Titan Mech
card_image_description: A border of dark, hexagonal carbon fiber plating. In the center, a 30-foot-tall bipedal mech, painted in olive drab military colors, stands amidst the wreckage of buildings. It has a boxy torso, a single red optical sensor for a head, and its arms are equipped with a minigun and a rocket pod.

name: Plasma Wraith
card_image_description: A border of dark, hexagonal carbon fiber plating. In the center, a ghostly, semi-translucent humanoid figure composed of swirling, unstable blue and white plasma floats menacingly in a dark power plant, its form crackling with raw energy.

name: Apex Predator
card_image_description: A border of jagged, dark obsidian with glowing, corrupted red circuits. In the center, a massive, quadrupedal beast that is a terrifying fusion of alien biology and advanced technology roars over the burning husk of a tank. It has chitinous armor plates, multiple glowing red eyes, and metallic talons.

name: Doom Bringer
card_image_description: A border of jagged, dark obsidian with glowing, corrupted red circuits. In the center, a colossal, demonic-looking machine that dwarfs buildings stands in a fiery cityscape. Its chassis is black and red, covered in spikes and glowing vents, and it wields a massive energy scythe.
